about_ai_p1: Avian Influenza (AI) is a contagious viral disease occurring in birds. Highly Pathogenic Avian Influenza (HPAI) is characterized by high mortality and rapid transmission.
about_ai_features_1: Pathogenicity: Classified as High (HPAI) or Low (LPAI)
about_ai_features_2: Transmission route: Wild birds → Poultry → Humans (some variants)
about_ai_features_3: Representative variants: H5N1, H7N9, H5N6, etc.
about_ai_zoonosis_p: Some AI viruses can infect humans. WHO classifies them as a public health threat and recommends continuous monitoring.
about_ai_world_p: Large-scale outbreaks have been repeatedly reported in Europe, Asia, North America, and Africa. In 2024, the first infection case was also confirmed in Antarctica.
about_service_intro: BirdFluAI is a visualization and analysis platform based on Highly Pathogenic Avian Influenza (HPAI) outbreak data.
about_service_features_1: Real-time outbreak visualization on a map
about_service_sources_p: Data is processed from public institutions such as WAHIS, Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency, Animal and Plant Quarantine Agency, and foreign quarantine agencies.
